releaseNotes:
v1.2.0 — Jamrah جَــمْــرَه

## ✨ Rebrand
- New app name: **Jamrah** (جمرة) — ember of productivity
- New icon (SVG)
- Updated update popup with icon + name

## 🎨 Improvements
- Settings sheet now white theme with black borders
- Removed progress ring from pomodoro timer
- Smooth slide-up/down animation for settings sheet
- Confirmation modals for delete habit, delete task, end session
- Goal tasks with Added/Done labels
- Session name input box
- Pomodoro controls hide when timer running

## 🐛 Bug Fixes
- Fixed End button not working when timer paused
- Fixed timer preset not updating when paused
- Fixed progress ring position
- Fixed dark text visibility in end popup
